hero.title: Your Trusted Partner in Industrial Seal and Plastic Profile Supply
hero.subtitle: With our broad portfolio of PVC, TPE and TPU profiles produced with modern extrusion technology and our experienced engineering team, we deliver tailored solutions for every project.

categories.title: Our Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Comprehensive range of products tailored to every industrial need.

about.title: A Trusted Supply Partner for Plastic Profiles and Seals
about.lead: CNRFlexis supplies plastic profiles based on PVC, TPE and TPU with modern extrusion technology and material engineering expertise.

quality.title: Product Quality
quality.description: Long-lasting products with rigorous quality control at every supply stage.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.description: Same-day shipping capability thanks to our broad stock network.

support.title: Technical Support
support.description: Continuous technical consulting and custom mold design throughout your project.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach out for questions, projects and custom solution requests.

quote.title: Request a Quote
quote.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you shortly.

placeholders.name: Your full name
placeholders.message: Share details about your project and request.

quote.success: Your message has been sent successfully. We'll get back to you shortly.
quote.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

custom.title: Tailored Production and Solutions
custom.lead: Need custom dimensions, color or cross-section on our existing products? Planning a special profile for a different application? Our engineering team designs custom molds and recommends formulations based on your project — send us your request and let's build the right solution together.
custom.modalSubtitle: Share your project details and any reference images or technical drawings — we'll respond with a tailored solution as soon as possible.
custom.detailsPlaceholder: Describe the change you need, target dimensions and technical specs, and the application area.
custom.attachmentsHint: Up to 4 files, max 1 MB each. JPG, PNG, WEBP.

errors.tooManyFiles: You can attach up to 4 files.

extrusion.title: Micron-Precision Manufacturing
extrusion.description: TPE, PVC and TPU profiles extruded in the exact cross-section, hardness and tolerance your project demands.

mold.title: Turnkey From Drawing to Mold
mold.description: We design and manufacture custom extrusion molds from your drawing or sample — prototype to serial production, all in-house.

lab.title: Accredited Quality Testing
lab.description: Every production batch passes tensile, hardness, ageing and UV tests — reported before shipment.

project.title: Transparent Production Flow
project.description: From inquiry to delivery every step runs through a single engineering contact — traceable and planned.
